productDisplayName: Scullers For Her Women Scarf Shirt Black Tops
description: CompositionBlack shirt with a darker shade of check lines made of 100% cotton, with full length sleeves that have a buttoned hem, front buttoned placket with a silk inner placket lining and tipped collar with a silk inseam in the same design as the scarf .Black scarf made of silk with floral print  FittingRegularWash care Wash dark colours separately Hand wash or machine wash in cold water Use mild detergent Tumble dry low Dry in shade Do not bleach Warm iron Slip into style with ease in this purple scarf shirt from scullers. The contoured seams and the full arm sleeves makes this shirt a great choice for everyday wear. Team it with denims, stilettos and sleek, long earrings for a really cool look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight: 5’9”; Chest: 33”; Shoulders: 15.5”
